description_zh: Patek Philippe（百达翡丽）是瑞士日内瓦最负盛名的顶级独立制表品牌，由安东尼·百达（Antoni Patek）和让·阿德里安·翡丽（Jean-Adrien Philippe）于1839年共同创立，是世界上最古老的独立家族制表企业之一。翡丽于1845年发明了无钥匙上链系统（表冠上链），成为腕表发展史上的重大突破。百达翡丽以制作世界上最复杂、最精密的机械腕表而闻名，至今仍然保持着多项包括最复杂功能的便携式时计在内的世界纪录。品牌奉行"代代相传"（Generations）的品牌哲学，其著名的广告语"You never actually own a Patek Philippe. You merely look after it for the next generation"（没有人能真正拥有百达翡丽，只不过为下一代保管而已）深入人心。每一枚百达翡丽腕表都经过长达数月至数年的手工精制，年产量仅约6万枚，是全球拍卖市场上最受追捧的钟表品牌之一。百达翡丽始终坚守独立制表传统，在日内瓦拥有自己的制表工坊，从机芯到表壳全部自主生产。

languages.en: Patek Philippe is one of the world's most prestigious independent watch manufacturers, founded in 1839 in Geneva by Antoni Patek and Jean-Adrien Philippe. A pioneer in horology, Philippe invented the stem-winding and setting mechanism in 1845. Renowned for creating the most complicated mechanical timepieces ever made, Patek Philippe holds numerous world records in watchmaking complexity. With production limited to approximately 60,000 watches annually, each piece requires months to years of meticulous handcrafting. The brand's iconic slogan 'You never actually own a Patek Philippe. You merely look it after for the next generation' embodies its philosophy of heirloom-quality craftsmanship. As the most sought-after brand at watch auctions worldwide, Patek Philippe remains fiercely independent and family-owned, producing every component in-house at its Geneva workshops.
